task_description: Rebuild Khmer Store as V2 - a classified ads marketplace like khmer24.com. Remove 3D, remove all fake data, fix all broken links/buttons, add proper pages with empty states, graceful Supabase fallback.

verification.summary: pnpm build succeeds with 15 routes generated (0 errors). pnpm lint passes with 0 errors (2 warnings about img elements). No fake data found in codebase. No dead links to removed pages. All 3D libraries removed from package.json.
